name: agent-chat-ai-sdk-migration
description: Replace agent.chat MCP tool internals with AI SDK streamText() using claudeCode() provider
acceptanceCriteria: Maps AI SDK streaming events to context.streamContent() for SSE compatibility
Captures tool calls from AI SDK response for toolCalls array
Session ID handling works for multi-turn conversations
MCP interface unchanged - mcpService.streamChat() continues working
Existing ConversationalAppBuilder demo still functions correctly
